Projects

Three-Tier Architecture on Azure Cloud
Cloud

Designed and deployed a scalable three-tier application architecture (presentation, application, and data layers) on Microsoft Azure. Provisioned infrastructure using Terraform for repeatable, version-controlled deployments. Containerized components with Docker and orchestrated using Kubernetes for high availability.

Azure Terraform Docker Kubernetes GitHub
Embedded Control Unit — EV Battery Management System
Major Project

Developed an embedded control unit to monitor and manage battery parameters for electric vehicles. Implemented logic to optimize charge/discharge cycles, improving battery lifespan and vehicle safety.
